rulings.Case Title: CALIFORNIA UNION SQUARE L.P. VS. SAKS & COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, January 14, 2021, Line 1. RESPONDENT SAKS & COMPANY LLC'S NMotion For Attorneys Fees Respondent's Motion for Attorney's Fees is DENIED. The parties agreed in their contract that arbitration-related fees will be paid by each respective party. Lease Section 3.1.(c)(iv). Parties further agreed that arbitration within the meaning of the contract does not only include the proceeding before an arbitrator, but also involves related court proceedings. See section 3.1 (c) "if the fair market rent is determined by arbitration, the award rendered in any arbitration hereunder may be entered in any court having jurisdiction and shall be final and binding upon the parties." =(501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing For Petition For Release Of Property From Lien Cal Civil Code Section 8480

rulings.Case Title: PEIXIA FUNG ET AL VS. TRUMARK COMPANIES, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER to CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, January 14, 2021, Line 3. CROSS COMPLAINANTS TRUMARK URBAN PARTNERS I, L.P., TRUMARK HOMES LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER to CROSS COMPLAINT Cross-Complainant's Motion to Strike Answer to Cross-Complaint is continued to February 17, 2021 for the parties to provide courtesy copies of their respective filings no later than that January 31, 2021. SFLR 2.7B. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON, VS. THERESA LYNNE MURPHY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, January 14, 2021, Line 4, CROSS DEFENDANT WILLIAM COLEMAN'S DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT Cross-Defendant Coleman's Demurrer to Cross-Complaint is SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Demurrer to the causes of action for fraud and negligent misrepresentation is sustained with leave to amend for Cross-Complainant to allege facts supporting justifiable reliance in light of the 2012 assignment and language of 2014 document recorded by Coleman/Pro30; and for Cross-Complaint to allege facts demonstrating that CC 2924(d) privilege is not applicable. Demurrer to the cause of action for "mistake" is sustained with leave to amend for Cross-Complaint to allege facts in support of each element of a cause of action for constructive trust against the moving Cross-Defendant. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL S NOUNOU VS. ANDREW LESKO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Seeking Relief To Extend Time To File Motion By Defendants And Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, January 14, 2021, Line 6. DEFENDANTS ANDREW LESKO, TARA JUELL'S Motion Seeking Relief To Extend Time To File Motion By Defendants And Proof Of Service Defendants' Motion Seeking Relief to Extend Time to File Motion is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and 1013. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL S NOUNOU VS. ANDREW LESKO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion Seeking Attorney Fee Award And Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, January 14, 2021, Line 6. DEFENDANTS ANDREW LESKO, TARA JUELL'S Motion Seeking Attorney Fee Award And Proof Of Service Defendant's Motion for Attorney's Fees. The Court will consider late-filed motion and opposition on the merits. The Motion for attorney's fees is DENIED. Moving party failed to establish its entitlement to attorney's fees under the circumstances of this case, which involves a voluntary dismissal of an unlawful detainer "contending that defendants had breached the 2016 Settlement Agreement" (Motion 5:27). See CC 1717; Santisas v. Goodin (1998) 17 Cal. 4th 559; Drybread v. Chipain Chiropractic Corp. (2007) 151 Cal.App.4th 1063. The Court notes that the request for fees is also purportedly made per SFRO 37.10B(b)(5). (Motion 2:5-6). No such subsection could be located in SFRO. =(501/CFH)
